title: St. Stephen’s College (U of Alberta Campus) - Canada.ca
content:
## St. Stephen’s College (U of Alberta Campus)
You’re eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP) if you complete one of the degrees below and you meet all other PGWP criteria :
- Doctor of Ministry (Supervisory Education)
- Master of Psychotherapy and Spirituality
- Master of Psychotherapy and Spirituality (Art Therapy Specialization)
- Master of Theological Studies
You’re not eligible if you complete any other program at this school.
